sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8889" key="a)nqrwpola/trhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνθρωπο-λάτρης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n8889.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">manworshipper,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">Νεστόριος ὁ ἀ.</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cod.Just.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.1.5</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
